Dark Web Bitcoin Mixer Service from the Dark Web

Since bitcoin is only pseudonymous and not really anonymous, everyone should use a bitcoin tumbler or bitcoin cleaner/mixer to protect their privacy.

The question is just, which of the many bitcoin mixers one should use.

For us it is clear, the best bitcoin tumblers today operate exclusively on the so-called dark web, as a tor hidden service.

In this guide, we will show you some of the best mixers currently available.

1. Mixabit Bitcoin Mixer

Our favorite dark web wallet and bitcoin mixer are Mixabit.

 

 

To access Mixabit Bitcoin Mixer on the dark web, you need the tor browser on desktop or Orweb and Orbot apps on android or Onion Browser on IOS.

Using the tor browser, you can access Mixabit on the following dark web link:

http://hqfld5smkr4b4xrjcco7zotvoqhuuoehjdvoin755iytmpk4sm7cbwad.onion/

Mix a bit only charges a fee of 0.5% for larger mixes.

And what makes it a really good mixer in our opinion is the fact that it is a bitcoin mixer and a bitcoin wallet combined.

If you just use it as your daily wallet, there is no way of telling which deposit and withdrawal belong to you.

It is a 100% perfect mix with other Mixabit users’ funds, without leaving any taint to your original coins.

Also, there is no timing or amount analysis possible, as long as you always wait a bit and don’t withdraw the full balance after only one deposit.

2. Dark Mixer

Another good bitcoin tumbler and anonymous bitcoin wallet are Dark Mixer, also located on the dark web as a .onion hidden service.

It does not have any fees and offers similar wallet and mixer functionality as Mixabit does.

Inside tor browser, or Orweb and Orbot for android, or Onion Browser for IOS, go to the following URL to visit Dark Mixer:

http://y22arit74fqnnc2pbieq3wqqvkfub6gnlegx3cl6thclos4f7ya7rvad.onion/

3. Freshly mined virgin bitcoins

When you need more than the usual mixer, you might want to buy freshly mined virgin bitcoins.

There is now a dark website that allows you to do that.

Again, using tor browser, or web and robot on android, or onion browser on IOS, browse to:

http://ovai7wvp4yj6jl3wbzihypbq657vpape7lggrlah4pl34utwjrpetwid.onion/

4. OnionWallet and Easycoin

The last 2 Bitcoin Mixers in this guide are OnionWallet and EasyCoin, 2 well-known high-volume bitcoin mixing services on the darknet.

Both sites exist since 2012 and are really trusted.

There are some reports about them stealing funds on the internet, but that was always because the user went to the wrong link and to a phishing site.

Never get phished while going to your bitcoin laundry site and only use the links on our site.

Our links have all been verified to be accurate and recent. So it is best if you bookmark this page, so you can always find the right link to your mixer of choice.

The tor links are:

http://p2qzxkca42e3wccvqgby7jrcbzlf6g7pnkvybnau4szl5ykdydzmvbid.onion/ OnionWallet

http://mp3fpv6xbrwka4skqliiifoizghfbjy5uyu77wwnfruwub5s4hly2oid.onion/ EasyCoin

As you can see there are many options to tumble your bitcoins with a bitcoin tumbler, and they don’t have to be expensive either.

Don’t pay the high fees some bitcoin laundry services are charging and use one of the tumblers above.

Stay safe and anonymous.

 

It’s everything about the dark web Bitcoin & bitcoin mixer service

 

What is cryptocurrency?

People use credit cards and bank accounts for buying and selling. There are several problems in using these payment systems. problem number one, the companies often take a cut of the transaction, people have to trust the companies in protecting customers’ personal data from hackers, and sometimes the payment method is very lengthy and costly. And to solve the problem the cryptocurrency has been launched. The cryptocurrency is made of cryptography where mathematics is used to protect information and data. The cryptocurrency is totally based on a computer network and there is no middleman in the transaction. That means when the sender sends data the data directly goes to the receiver. And the total transaction is totally anonymous.

So, no culprit can trace anyone. In this cryptocurrency method, the information goes very fast and the cost of transferring is very little. The payment method is super-fast and secured. There are some risks to using cryptocurrency. As the cryptocurrency transaction is anonymous, bad guys can take benefit from this. All dark web drugs transaction and weapon dealings are performed by cryptocurrency. So, crime can be raised.

What is Bitcoin?

Bitcoin is a digital asset that can be bought, sold, or transferred securely between parties over the Internet. Now, it’s a great store value similar to gold or silver or other investable assets and it’s also a form of digital currency that can be used to buy products and services or send money over the Internet to anybody that you own money. Now, unlike Fiat money such as dollars, yen, or euros Bitcoin isn’t physical. it’s more like when you spend money on your visa or through PayPal.

When you spend your bitcoin, a record of your Bitcoin account gets modified on the blockchain depending on whether you spent your Bitcoins or you accepted some bitcoins. and unlike Fiat money, there are no banks or clearinghouses, or middlemen involved in the transaction. also, nobody owns or controls the technology behind Bitcoin. it’s an open-source peer-to-peer network built and maintained by the Bitcoin community. that’s part of what makes it so cool. nobody can simply rush off and print more bitcoins causing inflation or hyperinflation. its release is controlled by only 21 million bitcoins that will ever be produced.

History of the Bitcoin?

Bitcoin is the first cryptocurrency that resurfaced in the world in 2008. and this virtual cryptocurrency starts working in 2009. When it resurfaces in the world, the value of one bitcoin was below one dollar. But now one bitcoin is above 56000 dollars. The founder of bitcoin is still unknown. Many people claim that Satoshi Nakamoto is the developer of bitcoin. But this is only thinking. according to Cambridge University, the number of bitcoin users is more than ten million. Bitcoin is widely known for dark web illegal payment transferring. Bitcoin.org domain was taken on 18 August 2008 in the name of Satoshi Nakamoto.

How does Bitcoin Works?

As bitcoin is a digital cryptocurrency, it is mostly used on the dark web. Most of the people on the dark web use bitcoin in every transaction. So, what can be done on the dark web by bitcoin?

Bitcoin is mostly used to give payments on the dark web. Most dark web users buy illegal products from the dark web. So, bitcoin is the safest way to buy anything from the dark web. A person can buy weapons from the dark web using bitcoin. In many countries buying a weapon is really difficult. Many verifications and reasons are performed to purchase a weapon. But using bitcoin anyone can buy a weapon. And he or she will not be indexed or tracked. So, most of the illegal weapons are purchased by bitcoin.

Another one is terror financing and delivering weapons. All terrorists use the dark web and bitcoin as transaction money. So, the terrorists buy weapons by bitcoin. And like this, all terrorists are being financed by bitcoin.

Bitcoin connection with the dark web

Now there are several ways to buy bitcoins but not all of them are anonymous. So, if you send money to this address using your bank account or using a service that verifies your identity, then your identity will be linked to this address and then any transfer you make from this address will be known and again will be traced back to your real identity. So, so far, we’re anonymous because this address is not linked to anything. Therefore, it’s very important that you buy your bitcoins anonymously.

So, the 1st way of doing this is to create bitcoins yourself, and to do that you’re going to have to mine bitcoins. So, we said that there are computers right here the yellow ones and we called the miners and these computers keep a copy of the blockchain and they use their computation power to keep the blockchain working. They do this by solving mathematical problems and calculating hashes so that the blockchain functions as it should now these mathematical problems and the calculations. they take a lot of computation power and a lot of electricity. Therefore, not anyone can afford to do this but if you can afford to do it then it is a really good way of generating bitcoins anonymously.

Is it true?

the next option is to use an exchange now using exchanges that are not anonymous. because when you use an exchange, they will ask for your bank information and they will ask you to verify your identity. But we can combine using an exchange with what’s known as Bitcoin tumbler or mixer. these are services that attempt to mask where the money is coming from. There is a lot of debate on how good or how anonymous this is. It adds an extra step when you are transferring the money. But this is a really good method because exchanges work all over the world. So, if you couldn’t get bitcoins any other way, then you might have to use this way where you use an exchange with a tumbler or mixer.

Why bitcoin is too damn important for darknet users?

The dark web is mainly used for illegal activities. Drug dealing, weapons smuggling, contract killing, hitman hiring, hacking, and money laundering are being done on the dark web. Mostly the drugs. Most countries banned drugs and give capital punishment to drug dealers, and smugglers. So, if you use the usual bank account, credit card, and PayPal accounts in dark web transactions, you will easily be caught by the police and security personnel. So, you need such a payment method that will be totally anonymous and no one can track you even the government. At this point, bitcoin is a virtual cryptocurrency that works and transacts totally anonymously. So, if you need to use the dark web, and if you purchase any products, you must have to use bitcoin. Other payment method does not work on the dark web.

Dark web bitcoin mixer service

Bitcoin is not anonymous at all. That means people can see the transaction and ledger of the bitcoin. So, it became difficult to transfer payments on the dark web. Because buying illegal products from the dark web is illicit. And the punishment is capital punishment. So, to solve the problem of identifying the bitcoin transfer, the bitcoin mixer service has been created. The bitcoin mixer mixes all bitcoin. So, there is no identification that that particular bitcoin you sent on the dark web.

As the transaction of bitcoin in general buying and selling is valid and legal. Here is an example regarding this bitcoin mixer understanding. A sends money to B, it is observable the idea behind of bitcoin mixer is that lots of people send money to it. in the mixture, these funds arrive and mix then the mixture pays the target addresses that way nobody knows whose money arrived at which address.

Understand it first

So, even if you know that Alice owns A, you have no idea if she paid money to C or D. on a technical level there are a few different ways to implement this. the core feature is anonymity. that’s why it is necessary to make sure the service is not compromised and analyzed. to gain trust a lot of mixers choose an open-source structure. that way you can ensure users that you are not going to steal their money. those mixers are then also free. the only thing you would need to pay is the transaction fee. in the mixture model, transaction fees occur twice (sending to the mixer and from there to the target address).

To increase this protection, you can connect mixers. So, your money goes from one mixer to the next and will eventually reach the recipient. another aspect is the amount. For example, Bob sends 3.432 Bitcoin into the mixer then Claire receives 3.432 Bitcoin. it is easy to infer that these payments are connected. for further obfuscation, time in amount both need to be hidden. so, payments can be intentionally split up into smaller ones. They can also be delayed to hide the timestamp.

Why it’s so very important to mix your coins before entering the dark web?

Bitcoin mixers are used to prevent the disclosure of people’s personal transactions. When you make a transaction with any party, the party keeps all information about your bitcoin holdings. So, they can easily find out how much bitcoin you have by checking the bitcoin address on the blockchain. Even your all current, past transaction can be exposed. So, people can easily monitor each and every input and output from your virtual currency wallet. And they can find out the address you own. In this term, the bitcoin mixers can make this monitoring impossible. No one can track your bitcoin transaction history by checking the blockchain checking.

Many political groups raise their funds anonymously. They don’t want to disclose the information about where the money has come from. Most of the time all fund-raising money comes through the dark web. So, as a virtual cryptocurrency, bitcoin is the main source of transferring money. But the bitcoin transaction is not private and anonymous all time. The security intelligence can check the transaction and the address from where the money came from. And the bitcoin mixers are used to keep all bitcoin transactions anonymous and private from the rest of the world. In this perspective, bitcoin mixing can easily prevent disclosing the real address and the sender’s address.

Spies in the whole world communicate with the dark web messaging system. Because it is fully anonymous. So, the security intelligence and the spies use the bitcoin to get off give money. But there is a high risk of getting caught during the transaction of the bitcoin. To keep the spies safe, they mix the bitcoins with other bitcoins. So, it is quite difficult to identify the senders and the receivers of the bitcoin transaction.

Drug-Alert

But in reality, the majority of the transaction of bitcoin is used for buying and selling drugs. So, if there is no security system to keep the address anonymous, why people will use bitcoin? That’s why the bitcoin mixers are used to keep each and every transaction hidden from the security intelligence.

5 important facts about the dark web bitcoin:

The dark web is a part of the internet site that is hidden from the rest of the world. It can be accessed only by specialized web browsers. Generally, people use the dark web to stay anonymous and hidden on the internet. The dark web is highly used for illegal activities. The dark web is full of websites at forums and services that we can use but it’s hidden under a layer of protection. under the surface lesson nest of dark and hidden activities that are blocked off from the rest of the world. Using bitcoin on the dark web is a little bit complicated. Here are 5 important facts about the dark web bitcoin.

  1. Bitcoin is not fully anonymous

Most of the dark web is used for illegal activities. Many people think about buying or selling on the dark web is easy. you might think Bitcoin is anonymous in fact it can be. but for a lot of us it most likely isn’t. to explain this let’s have a more detailed look at how money is sent. users have addresses and this is what they can look like each address has a balance this balance consists of the sum of all transactions. but each transaction is stored on a public Ledger. this means every single move of Bitcoin can be seen by everyone. this is what we call pseudonymous. To remove the transaction history people, use bitcoin mixer, tumbler.

  1. The dark web is not Fully anonymous

The dark web is also not fully anonymous. There are many specialized browsers especially for browsing on the dark web. The browsers of the surface web like Google, Saffery, and Bing will not work.

  1. Tor browser

Surface web browsers will not work on the dark web. So, if you want to enter into the dark web, you will have to use the Tor browser. Otherwise, you cannot enter. And your bitcoin transaction will not work

  1. Premium VPN

Even the Tor browser is not fully anonymous. If you buy products using bitcoin, your activities will appear in your network provider. They can provide it to the security police. So, before using the Tor browser and entering the dark web, you must have to use a premium paid VPN.

  1. Never be cheated

On the dark web, the world is full of cheating. If you buy any product using bitcoin, be careful about its trustworthiness. There are plenty of bad guys. So, be careful before buying anything with your bitcoin. Otherwise, your bitcoin will be lost.

 

 

A bitcoin tumbler is a service where the bitcoins are blended and collected from various customers and remove the origin of the transaction. Bitcoin is not fully anonymous and at present, the transaction of bitcoin is visible to everyone. Everyone can see who is investing in bitcoin, and how many bitcoins have that particular person. So, as the bitcoin transaction is visible, any account can be hacked. If you pay for any illegal products, police will arrest you following your history of the transaction.

To solve the problem of detecting, a bitcoin tumbler has been invented where the history of the bitcoin transaction no longer remains. And police will not be able to arrest because there is no bitcoin history transaction.

Should you invest in Bitcoin?

Bitcoin is the most trending topic in the world. This is a virtual cryptocurrency. Some people may be concerned about the sustainability of the bitcoin but bitcoin is highly secured. Even sometimes it is far better secured than digital currency. People use credit cards and bank accounts for buying and selling. There are several problems in using these payment systems. problem number one, the companies often take a cut of the transaction, people have to trust the companies in protecting customers’ personal data from hackers, and sometimes the payment method is very lengthy and costly. And to solve the problem cryptocurrency has been launched. The cryptocurrency is made of cryptography where mathematics is used to protect information and data.

The cryptocurrency is totally based on a computer network and there is no middleman in the transaction. That means when the sender sends data the data directly goes to the receiver. And the total transaction is totally anonymous. So, no culprit can trace anyone. You can invest thinking three things.

  1. Gaining knowledge.

Many people invest in general currency. Many of them make a profit and many of them make a loss. In investing the most important thing is the previous ledger. That means how much profit a particular company gained. If the previous 5 years earning profit is good, people invest there. So, the transaction and profit-making percentage are very satisfactory in bitcoin. When the bitcoin was launched first, the value of one bitcoin was less than one dollar. But now in 2021 one bitcoin is more than $56000.

  1. It Has an Authority

There are many cryptocurrencies launched before or after bitcoin, like Ethereum, Litecoin, Monero, Ripple, etc. But bitcoin is far beyond comparatively. Bitcoin has a strict monitoring system. In real life, if the dollar falls in shortage, the authority can print. But the new bitcoin cannot be produced whether there are many bitcoins or fewer. There is a certain number of bitcoins. And after fulfilling the number, no bitcoin will come.

  1. The Government Supports it

Bitcoin is acceptable in most countries. You can buy and sell products by bitcoin. Recently, the number one rich Elon Musk has invested 1.5 billion US dollars in bitcoin. Bitcoin is accessible to all countries. Even you can withdraw bitcoin from bank and ATM booths.

Dark Web freshly mined Bitcoin

Bitcoin mining is the process of creating and building a new bitcoin. It is done by solving specialized computational puzzles. bitcoin has no certain authority. When one person transacts a bitcoin to another person, a new bitcoin is created. And this bitcoin making will stay until 2040. After every four years of bitcoin, the value of the old bitcoin decrees to a half value.

On the dark web only, bitcoin is accessible. And after every dark web bitcoin transaction, the new bitcoin is about to create. And then there are several processes of making bitcoin. Alike the general money if you save the bitcoin like the currency, it will not be fruitful. Because every four years after, the value of the old bitcoin decrees almost half. So, once you transact bitcoin on the dark web, it is quite impossible to go out. The money will not let you go out.

Importance of learning about bitcoin before investing in it

investing in bitcoin is like investing in the stock market. If anyone can invest with the proper knowledge and research, he or she will be a millionaire or billionaire. So, learning is the most important not only in investing in bitcoin but also for anything. Otherwise, the whole money will be lost. And for the accusation of illegal activities and dark web, you can be arrested.

 

Dark Web Bitcoin Mixer Links

The dark web is the Heaven of all illegal products and activities. The general payment methods are not accessible on the dark web. The only cryptocurrency works here. Here are some bitcoin mixer links on the dark web.

  • io

This is an amazing bitcoin mixer service. There you will get the minimum fixed fee. The minimum rate is 0.5% and the maximum is 3%. There are some fantastic features. This transaction is extremely anonymous, and fast. You have the choice to customize every transaction. And there are no logs. That means they never keep any logs.

  • BitMix

The BitMix is also good and cost-effective. The minimum charge rate is 0.8% and the maximum rate is 3%. there is a facility of choosing the fee manually during the mixing. There is an address fee of 0.00015 BTC per output address. The facilities are, the transactions are fully anonymous, instant transfer system and a partner program system.

  • Mux Tum.io

This mixing service is a little bit expensive compared to that of others. The transaction fee is 5% and the network fee is +0.00015 BTC. But there are more facilities than before. There are different mixing approaches, no logs have been collected. You don’t need to register anymore. You can add multiple withdrawal addresses. They have a 24/7 tech support system.

  • CryptoMixer

The minimum fee of this service is 0.5% and an extra 0.0005 BTC for every deposited transaction. The facilities are there is no minimum or maximum transaction. So, you can mix the bitcoins how much you want to do. This is highly secured.

Conclusion

The dark web and bitcoin both are dependent. without the bitcoin, you can only browse and see products on the dark web, and without the dark web, the transaction of bitcoin is almost low. The dark web is mostly used for illegal activities but good deeds also happened here. And bitcoin is also used widely for dark web payments. But at present, the use of bitcoin is normalizing to the people. People are using bitcoin. You can transfer bitcoin by ATM booth.

Bitcoin Tumblers To Avoid

Never use tumblers that operate on the clear web, only .onion dark web mixers provide true anonymity.

So avoid all the mixers like ChipMixer, BitMix, MyBitMix, Cryptomixer, Privcoin, and Foxmixer.

They all operate on clear web domains, so they can not be trusted.

Even worse, most of them use Cloudflare and google analytics, while nice tools for webmasters, for a bitcoin mixer it removes a lot of privacy and leaves user’s data open for Cloudflare and google to snoop on.

And they all don’t provide a wallet, instead, they take your bitcoins, and claim to send you unrelated bitcoins back.

But the big problem is they will send the same amount back to you, minus a fee. And this is easy to spot for blockchain analytics companies working for exchanges and the government.

So if you want truly anonymous bitcoin then don’t use those mixers and instead use one of the tumblers with an integrated wallet we presented in this guide.

If you are using an anonymous bitcoin wallet like Mixabit for example, then you have full control over when you withdraw your coins and which amounts.

And that will provide you with far more anonymity than the mixers which do not work as a bitcoin wallet.
